global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with a clear focus on the brand and service offered.
global.main_message: Promoting a travel app for booking hotels and flights easily.

elements.label: Purple background
elements.description: A solid purple background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the other elements.

elements.label: WayPoint
elements.description: The word 'WayPoint' is prominently displayed in bold, large font at the top of the ad, conveying the brand name.

elements.label: Fly smarter Hotels
elements.description: The text 'Fly smarter Hotels flights in one tap' is presented in a clear, modern font, positioned centrally to communicate the service offered.

elements.label: Flights in one tap
elements.description: This text complements the main body text, emphasizing convenience and ease of use in a smaller font.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A small circular icon is placed at the top left, adding a decorative touch to the ad.

elements.label: Install now
elements.description: The call-to-action 'Install now' is displayed in a bold, eye-catching button at the bottom of the ad, encouraging user interaction.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small decorative element that does not convey specific information, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: Another small decorative element, similar to ID 7, adding visual interest without specific meaning.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small rectangular shape at the top right, serving as a decorative feature.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small rectangular element in the center, possibly for additional text or imagery.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo of the brand is displayed prominently at the top, reinforcing brand identity.

elements.label: Service description
elements.description: The text describes the service offered, positioned centrally to attract attention.
elements.text_content: Fly smarter Hotels flights in one tap

elements.label: Install button
elements.description: A clear and inviting button at the bottom of the ad, urging users to take action.
